voices.lens: Former congresswoman and police chief. Black woman moderate Democrat. Law enforcement perspective from the left.

quotes.quote: Two U.S. citizens have been killed by ICE agents under extremely questionable circumstances. No investigation, no accountability. All part of the President's attempt to confiscate voter rolls. Believe your eyes and ears and stand up and speak out against what we know is wrong.

All routine ICE Operations should be suspended. Two Americans are dead. The use of deadly force is not a time to "just move on." More may be killed. Suspend and investigate. This is out of control. nbcnews.com/news/us-news/min…

Immigration laws matter. HOWEVER, due to the recent shootings and questions about ICE’s authority, recruiting, and training,  all routine operations in communities should be suspended until an independent review. ICE should always coordinate with local law enforcement.

A young mother has been shot and killed. Everyone, regardless of the outcome of a “legitimate” investigation, should feel bad about that, including POTUS, VP, and Ice. Contrary to the VP’s reckless claim, ICE does not have “absolute immunity.” Heaven help us.

voices.lens: Comedian and podcaster from rural Louisiana. Brings a working-class, Southern perspective. Disarming humor on serious topics.

quotes.quote: What are we paying taxes for?

voices.lens: Conservative content creator and Turning Point USA chief creative officer. Viral short-form political content. Pro-MAGA.

quotes.quote:
Senator John Fetterman (D-PA): “We all have to acknowledge that this shutdown had no impact, zero impact on ICE, all of the funding was already in place there.”

Fund DHS. Pay all the TSA workers who’ve been working without pay. The shutdown does no good.
